# Test Case Design - Powertrain

High-level test cases for the **Powertrain** architecture model. Powertrain coordinator: torque arbitration, throttle, gear selection and cruise.

---
## Test Case: TC.001 - torque init & cyclic

**Given** the ECU has powered on
**When** `Pwt_Torque_Init` then `Pwt_Torque_Step` are called
**Then** the phase becomes RUN and `value` is a filtered, clamped sample (REQ-PWT-TOR7)
